extDescription.message: Know what's exposed. Stop it before it leaves.

category_myMoney_desc.message: Cards, bank accounts, and payment details

category_myHealth_desc.message: Health cards, medical records, and conditions

category_myDigitalLife_desc.message: Passwords, API keys, and private credentials

category_myLocation_desc.message: Home address, GPS coordinates, and travel plans

tier_free_limitReached.message: You've reached your free plan limit.

scan_dropPrompt.message: Drop a file here or click to browse

scan_privacy.message: This file stays on your device. Nothing is uploaded.

settings_protections_desc.message: Turn off any category you don't want ShieldMe to watch.

settings_advanced_desc.message: Fine-tune which specific items are watched within each category.

settings_apiConnections_desc.message: Connect your own accounts to unlock extra checks. Keys are stored on your device only.

settings_api_hibp_desc.message: Check if your email appeared in a known data breach. Requires your own free API key.

settings_api_deleteMe_desc.message: Automate removal requests from people-search sites.

settings_api_keyStored.message: Key saved. Stored on your device only.

detector_usBank.message: US bank routing and account numbers

detector_minorName.message: Children's names with age or school

detector_schoolInfo.message: School name and year group combos

onboarding_presetPicker_title.message: Tell us about you — we'll turn on the right protections.

preset_default_global_desc.message: The basics everyone should have watched — credit cards, passwords, and email addresses.

preset_residency_us_title.message: I live in the United States

preset_residency_us_desc.message: Watches your SSN, driver's license, state ID, U.S. bank info, and health insurance number.

preset_residency_uk_title.message: I live in the United Kingdom

preset_residency_uk_desc.message: Watches your National Insurance number, NHS number, UK driver's licence, and UK bank details.

preset_residency_de_desc.message: Watches your Personalausweis, German tax ID, bank details, and health insurance.

preset_residency_fr_desc.message: Watches your CNI, INSEE (Social Security), French tax ID, and bank details.

preset_residency_it_desc.message: Watches your Codice Fiscale, Italian ID card, driver's licence, and bank details.

preset_residency_es_desc.message: Watches your DNI/NIE, Spanish passport, driver's licence, and bank details.

preset_residency_pt_desc.message: Watches your NIF, Cartão de Cidadão, passport, and bank details.

preset_residency_gr_desc.message: Watches your AFM, AMKA (social security), ΑΔΤ (ID card), Greek passport, and bank details.

preset_residency_nl_desc.message: Watches your BSN, Dutch passport, driver's licence, and IBAN.

preset_residency_au_desc.message: Watches your Tax File Number, Medicare number, driver's licence, and Australian bank details.

preset_residency_ca_desc.message: Watches your Social Insurance Number, Canadian passport, driver's licence, health card, and bank details.

preset_residency_jp_desc.message: Watches your My Number (individual), bank details, residence card, and driver's licence.

preset_region_eu_desc.message: Adds EU-wide protections for debit cards, passports and driver's licences accepted across the EU.

preset_region_traveler_desc.message: Adds passports and driver's licences for the countries you're most likely to visit.

preset_work_payments_title.message: I handle payment cards at work

preset_work_payments_desc.message: Watches credit card numbers, card and holder-name combos. Protects you from accidentally emailing cardholder data.

preset_work_healthcare_desc.message: Watches medical record numbers, diagnoses, medications, and patient identifiers.

preset_work_developer_desc.message: Watches API keys, cloud credentials, private keys, connection strings, and SSH/PGP material.

preset_life_parent_desc.message: Watches minor-name and school-or-age combos, children's identifiers, and family address blocks.

preset_life_traveler_desc.message: Adds passports for countries you commonly visit plus home-address and itinerary proximity detectors.

preset_life_privacymax_desc.message: Turns on every detector in every category — highest sensitivity. Expect more warnings.

preset_radar_essentials_desc.message: Runs a password breach check and opens the 20-site data-removal checklist.

settings_presets_desc.message: Pick the options that match your life — we'll turn on the right protections.

settings_presets_none.message: No presets active — using your manual settings.

settings_presets_preview_add.message: Applying will turn on $1 more protection(s).

settings_presets_preview_noChange.message: No changes — selections already match your active presets.
